titleStmt.title: SII 17.309: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 309. (A.R. No. 280 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This records the gift of 32 cows for burning a perpetual lamp to the god, by Malaitāṅgi Kampaṉ Udaiyan alias Parakēsari-Muttaraiyaṉ. The cows were entrusted to the care of a shepherd•••• śēri of Veṇkalattūr alias Satyāśrayakulakālapuram in Veṇkal-nāḍu, a subdivision of Paiyyūr-Iḷaṅgōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumannivaḷara Iru
nilamaṭantaiyum poṟce
yappāvaiyum cirttaniccelviyum taṉperunteviyarā(k)ki yiṉpuṟa neṭutiya
lūḻiyuḷ ḷiṭaiytuṟaināṭu(m) ntuṭarvanavelip paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷi
c cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇar karumaraṇ maṇṇai kaṭak
kamum porukaṭaliḻatta
rayartamuṭiyum Āṅkavar tevi
yaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum munṉavar pakka
ṟ ṟeṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intira nārvamum
teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik
keraḷan muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum kulatanamākiya palarpukaḻmu
ṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperu
ṅkāval palpaḻantivum ceruvil ciṉavil Irupattorukā larai
cukaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāman mevaruṇ cāntimattivaraṇ karuti Iru
ttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyu
m payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil
mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅka naḷappe
rum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyiliraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiilakkamum navaneti
kkulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭaval
lai maturamaṇṭalamum kā(mu)miṭaivaḷa nāmaṇaik koṇaiyum
veñcina virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaipaḻana mācuṇite
camum Ayarvilvaṇkirtti Ātinakaravaiyil cantiran tolkulat
tintirātaṉai m piṭittu kiṭṭaruñciṟu
viḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum lai nāṭum tanmapālaṉai
vemmuṉaiyaḻittu ṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai
muraṇukat tākki kirtti takkaṇalāṭamum
m toṭukaṭaṟ kāval veñcamar viḷākattañcu
vittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum
peṇṭiṟ paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭamum veṟimalart
tirttat teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyu malaikaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāval
viṉai Ilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamum kāvalam puricai mevili
paṅkamu(ṅ)m viḷaiyappantūṟiṭaiy viḷaiyppantūṟuṅ kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakko
lamun titamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamuṅ kalāmuri kaṭuntiṟal Ilāmuṟitecamun teṉakkalar(p) poḻi
l māṉakkavāramun toṭukaṭaṟkāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭkaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa
koppara kecarivanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentiracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 18
Āvatu malaitāṅki kampaṉ Utaiyanāna parakecarimuttaraiyan Uṭaiyārkku vaiyt
ta tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku vaiytta pacu muppattiraṇṭuṅ koṇṭu cantirātittava
ṟ celuttuvenānen paiyyūr Iḷaṅkoṭṭattu veṇkalnāṭṭu veṇka
lattūrāṉa cattiyāciraiyakulakālapurattu maṉṟāṭi ceriyaṉ .
Digital edition of SII 17.309 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
